overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, speeding through Night City's neon-lit downtown streets at night. The rider navigates wet reflective asphalt under overpasses and past futuristic skyscrapers with vibrant holographic advertisements.

events.description: motorcycle accelerates rapidly, speedometer climbing past 80 km/h
distinctive purple neon spiral building enters view on right side

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle at high speed through wet downtown streets, hands visible on handlebars with glowing blue front light

notable_agents.action: red taillights of car ahead moving in same direction

entered.detail: reflective wet multi-lane road surface with yellow and white markings
concrete highway overpass spanning across the road
tall cylindrical building wrapped with purple and pink neon spiral lights
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
tall pole lights lining the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-speed motorcycle ride on wet reflective asphalt under concrete overpasses. The distinctive neon spiral building appears on the right as the rider accelerates through the multi-lane highway, with digital billboards and street lights visible along the route.

events.description: motorcycle crosses wide yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk
rider slows down navigating intersection, speed drops to 20 km/h
accelerating out of turn, speed increasing back to 60+ km/h

agents.ego_description: navigating through intersections, slowing for crosswalks then accelerating, passing the neon spiral structure

notable_agents.action: black car ahead maintaining distance, brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes
tall illuminated corporate towers visible in the distance
tropical trees lining the street median

segments.scene_description: The rider navigates urban intersections with prominent yellow crosswalks, slowing down and accelerating through turns. The neon spiral building passes behind as distant skyscrapers come into view ahead, with palm trees lining the street.

events.description: entering dense skyscraper district with buildings towering on both sides
passing under massive overpass with overhead digital billboards becoming visible

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed through the downtown canyon, maintaining steady throttle

entered.detail: large digital screens suspended over the highway displaying advertisements
green directional signage suspended over lanes

segments.scene_description: Driving through the heart of downtown with skyscrapers rising on both sides forming an urban canyon. The rider passes under massive overpasses as overhead digital billboards and highway signs come into view, maintaining high speed on the wet reflective pavement.

events.description: executing right turn at intersection, leaning into curve
entering section with continuous neon-lit wall on right side

agents.ego_description: making a right turn then accelerating along a highway section with neon barriers

notable_agents.action: black car overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: tall concrete retaining wall illuminated with continuous red and green neon strip lights
low-rise warehouse structures with minimal lighting

segments.scene_description: The rider executes a right turn and enters a highway section featuring a distinctive neon-lit retaining wall on the right. Industrial buildings appear on the left while other vehicles share the road, creating a more enclosed corridor feeling with reduced sky visibility.

events.description: destination marker appears on HUD, indicating approach to objective
gradual deceleration as destination approaches, speed dropping to 70 km/h

agents.ego_description: cruising toward destination marker, maintaining lane position on final approach

entered.detail: floating navigation marker indicating target location ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the destination with a navigation marker visible ahead. The neon wall passes behind as the environment becomes more industrial with lower buildings. The rider maintains steady speed while closing in on the objective marker.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed motorcycle journey that transitions from the open, neon-lit highways of downtown into a dense, industrial corridor. It begins with a rapid acceleration across wet reflective asphalt under concrete overpasses, passing a distinctive neon spiral building and digital billboards. As the rider navigates through urban intersections and past lining palm trees, the scene shifts into a towering urban canyon of skyscrapers and massive overhead highway signs. The camera then executes a right turn, moving from the open city center into a more enclosed corridor defined by a neon-lit retaining wall and industrial buildings. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly industrial with lower buildings as the rider maintains a steady speed toward a visible navigation marker.
